summary: Full e2e testing of ML PLOMBERIE website - backend APIs and frontend UI. All major features working correctly.

issues: Abstract blue/white wave image used - not directly plumbing-related, but modern aesthetic works for the brand

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is clean and well-structured - _id excluded from MongoDB response correctly
No authentication on GET /api/contacts endpoint - anyone can read submitted contact messages (minor privacy concern)
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test contacts via POST /api/contact during testing (TEST_Jean Dupont, TEST_Persist Check)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working. Backend: POST /api/contact and GET /api/contacts both pass. Frontend: Navigation (all 5 links), Hero CTAs, 7 service cards, FAQ accordion (6 items, expand/collapse works), Contact form (fills, submits, shows success toast), Mobile hamburger Sheet menu all work correctly. Portfolio has 5 elements (requirement says 4). Phone number in nav is '06 20 51 54 30' (formatted with spaces, not '062051543').
